core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Aesop's Trust + Apple's Clarity + Airbnb's Guidance
Emotion First: Every pixel conveys 'Care' and 'Premium Utility'
Content is King: Products are heroes, text is the guide
Zoom In: Intimate close-ups of textures and expressions
anti_patterns: No bright purple/teal CTAs (Use deep forest or warm amber)

headings.usage: Hero titles, Section headers, Emotional taglines

modes.marketing: Asymmetrical, large hero elements, overlapping text
modes.listing: Dense but breathable grid (3 columns on desktop, 1 on mobile)

hero_section.layout: Full-width image with 'Glass' overlay for text
hero_section.content: Personalized greeting ('Good morning, [Pet Name]') + Key Value Prop

elements: Match Score (Ring indicator, e.g., '98% Match for Bruno')

personal_picks.vibe: Curated, thoughtful, specific to pet needs

filters.location: Horizontal scrollable bar or Drawer on mobile

assets.icons: Lucide React (Feather icons) - stroke-width: 1.5px (Fine lines for premium feel)

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. USE EXISTING SHADCN COMPONENTS: Do not reinvent the wheel. Use /components/ui/tabs, /card, /button, /badge.
2. CUSTOMIZE VIA TAILWIND: Add the 'Aesop' feel by using the design tokens (Syne font, deep teal, warm stone bg).
3. PERSONALIZATION IS KEY: The 'Personal Picks' section must be the first thing the user sees after the Hero. It should feel like a 'For You' page.
4. PRODUCTS & SERVICES TABS: Implement a clean toggle that switches the grid content without full page reload if possible (client-side state).
5. SEARCH & FILTERS: Make search prominent (Apple style). Use 'Pills' for category filtering.
6. MOBILE FIRST: Ensure the grid collapses to 1 column on mobile and images don't overflow.
7. IMAGE ASPECT RATIO: Use aspect-square for products, but allow aspect-video for services to differentiate.
8. MOCK DATA: If API fails, fallback to elegant mock data.
9. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs).
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
NO center aligning the App container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures/noise overlays are encouraged.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
